title: System Functions
description: The system shall provide a user-friendly interface for users to submit witnessed crimes.

title: Detailed Functional Specification
description: The system shall validate and categorize incidents using advanced image processing algorithms.

title: System Overview
description: The system shall provide a dynamic dashboard and interactive map to display reported crimes.

title: System Scope
description: The system shall integrate with Uber and Careem to provide the safest route for users.

title: Objectives
description: The system shall enhance user safety by recommending safer routes based on historical crime data analysis.

title: User Characteristics
description: The system shall cater to users with varying levels of technical expertise.

title: System Context
description: The system shall integrate with the police to receive real-time crime updates and notifications.
